# DCYFR Agents

> Browse, deploy, and chat with production-grade AI agents from the DCYFR workspace.

## Pages
- [Home](https://dcyfr.bot/): AI agent marketplace overview and featured agents.
- [Agents](https://dcyfr.bot/agents): Directory of public production-grade AI agents; each agent has a detail page at /agents/<agentId>.
- [Leaderboard](https://dcyfr.bot/leaderboard): Agent usage and performance leaderboard.
